<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.17 -->

# crates/attractor-tools/src

Implements the tool execution abstraction layer for the Attractor system, defining async traits for filesystem and shell operations (`ExecutionEnvironment`), concrete local implementations via tokio (`LocalExecutionEnvironment`), LLM-callable tool definitions (`Tool`), provider-specific tool profiles (`ToolProfile`), and output truncation strategies, alongside six built-in tools in the `builtin/` subdirectory.

## Contents

- [lib.rs](./lib.rs) — Barrel re-export of `Tool`, `ExecutionEnvironment`, `LocalExecutionEnvironment`, `ToolProfile`, `ToolRegistry`, truncation utilities, and six built-in tool structs (`ReadFileTool`, `WriteFileTool`, `EditFileTool`, `ShellTool`, `GrepTool`, `GlobTool`).
- [environment.rs](./environment.rs) — `ExecutionEnvironment` async trait (`#[async_trait]`) defining `read_file`, `write_file`, `file_exists`, `list_directory`, `exec_command`, `grep`, `glob_files`, `working_directory`, `platform`. Exports `ExecResult`, `DirEntry`, `GrepOptions`.
- [local_env.rs](./local_env.rs) — `LocalExecutionEnvironment` struct implementing `ExecutionEnvironment` via `tokio::fs` and `tokio::process`. Filters environment variables by suffix, implements process timeout with SIGTERM/SIGKILL cascade.
- [tool.rs](./tool.rs) — `Tool` async trait with `execute(arguments: Value, env: &dyn ExecutionEnvironment)` and `definition() -> ToolDefinition`. `ToolRegistry` HashMap storage for `Box<dyn Tool>`.
- [profiles.rs](./profiles.rs) — `ToolProfile` with `name` and `tools: Vec<String>`. Factory methods `anthropic()`, `openai()`, `gemini()` return 6-tool profiles. `build_registry()` maps names to built-in implementations.
- [truncation.rs](./truncation.rs) — `truncate_output` with `TruncationMode::HeadTail` (40/60 split) and `TruncationMode::Tail`. Returns original if `output.len() <= max_chars`.

## Subdirectories

- [builtin/](./builtin/) — Six built-in tool implementations (`ReadFileTool`, `WriteFileTool`, `EditFileTool`, `ShellTool`, `GrepTool`, `GlobTool`). Each implements `Tool` trait, uses `ExecutionEnvironment` for I/O, applies truncation limits. See subdirectory AGENTS.md.

## Architecture / Data Flow

`Tool::execute` receives `serde_json::Value` arguments and `&dyn ExecutionEnvironment`, returns `attractor_types::Result<String>`. `LocalExecutionEnvironment` provides concrete tokio-based filesystem, subprocess, and glob/grep implementations. `ToolProfile` constructs `ToolRegistry` containing name-to-trait-object mappings for specific LLM providers. Built-in tools in `builtin/` implement `Tool` and delegate filesystem/shell operations to the environment abstraction, enabling testability via `MockEnv` (in-memory `ExecutionEnvironment` implementation referenced in `lib.rs` tests).

## API Surface

Re-exports: `EditFileTool`, `GlobTool`, `GrepTool`, `ReadFileTool`, `ShellTool`, `WriteFileTool`; `DirEntry`, `ExecResult`, `ExecutionEnvironment`, `GrepOptions`; `LocalExecutionEnvironment`; `ToolProfile`; `Tool`, `ToolDefinition`, `ToolRegistry`; `truncate_output`, `TruncationMode`.

## Behavioral Contracts

- **Truncation math**: `HeadTail` head size = `max_chars * 40 / 100`, tail size = `max_chars - head_size`.
- **Truncation warnings**: `"{}\n[WARNING: Output truncated. {} characters removed from middle]\n{}"` (HeadTail), `"\n[WARNING: Output truncated. {} characters removed from start]\n{}"` (Tail).
- **Builtin output limits**: `MAX_OUTPUT_CHARS = 20_000` (glob, grep via `TruncationMode::Tail`), `30_000` (shell via `TruncationMode::HeadTail`), `50_000` (read_file via `TruncationMode::HeadTail`).
- **ReadFileTool format**: `"{:>width$} | {}"` (line number right-aligned, pipe separator).
- **ShellTool format**: `"Exit code: {}\nStdout:\n{}\nStderr:\n{}"`.
- **Missing field errors**: `"{field} is required"` (e.g., `"file_path is required"`, `"pattern is required"`, `"command is required"`).
- **EditFileTool exact match**: Error on multiple matches: `"old_string found {count} times in {path} (at lines: {occurrences:?}). Use replace_all=true to replace all occurrences."` Error on zero matches: `"old_string not found in {}"`.
- **Local environment filtering**: Excludes env keys where `key.to_lowercase().ends_with(s)` for `s` in `["_api_key", "_secret", "_token", "_password", "_credential"]`. Always includes `PATH`, `HOME`, `USER`, `SHELL`, `LANG`, `TERM`, `TMPDIR`.
- **Command timeout**: Error format `"Command timed out after {}ms"`. Implementation sends `SIGTERM` to process group via `libc::kill(-(pid as i32), libc::SIGTERM)`, awaits `Duration::from_secs(2)`, then `child.kill().await` for `SIGKILL`.
- **Grep output templates**: With line numbers: `"{}:{}:{}"` (path, line number, content). Without: `"{}:{}"` (path, content).
- **Anthropic profile tool list**: `["read_file", "write_file", "edit_file", "shell", "grep", "glob"]`.

## Patterns

- **Async Trait Objects**: `Tool` and `ExecutionEnvironment` use `#[async_trait]` macro with `Send+Sync` bounds to enable boxed trait objects (`Box<dyn Tool>`, `&dyn ExecutionEnvironment`).
- **Barrel Re-export**: `lib.rs` aggregates public symbols from child modules; `builtin/mod.rs` aggregates six tool implementations.
- **Builder Pattern (Test)**: `MockEnv` (referenced in `lib.rs` tests) uses `with_file(path, content)` and `with_exec_result(stdout, stderr, exit_code)` builder methods for in-memory `ExecutionEnvironment` setup.

## File Relationships

`lib.rs` depends on all sibling modules and `builtin/` subdirectory. `local_env.rs` implements `environment.rs` trait. `profiles.rs` depends on `tool.rs` (`ToolRegistry`) and `builtin/` (tool implementations). `builtin/` tools depend on `environment.rs` (`ExecutionEnvironment`) and `truncation.rs` (`truncate_output`). `tool.rs` defines `ExecutionEnvironment` reference in `execute` signature.

## Stack

Rust crate `attractor-tools`. Dependencies: `tokio` (async runtime), `async_trait`, `serde`, `serde_json`, `regex`, `globset`, `libc`. Entry point `lib.rs`.
